name: Multi Regex Extractor
description: This node is used to extract pattern from input columns
input: This type of node takes in a DataFrame and transforms it to another DataFrame
output: This node extract pattern from input columns as specified

fields.name: patterns
fields.title: Patterns
fields.description: patterns or regex to extract the input column name

fields.name: groups
fields.title: Groups
fields.description: An regular expression group number starting with 1, defining which portion of the matching string will be returned
